perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a flat cap and glasses is lying on a sofa, holding an iPhone and talking to the camera with an expressive face. (2) Transition to a stylized animation of a car driving through a neon tunnel, followed by a 3D map graphic with location pins. (3) The screen displays a screen recording of the iPhone Settings interface, navigating through 'General' to 'Keyboard' and 'Text Replacement'. (4) The man reappears in the bottom corner of the screen while the main frame shows a messaging app interface where text is being automatically filled. (5) The man returns to the full frame on the sofa, pointing at the camera and gesturing enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop BGM starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic male voice speaks in Mandarin with a friendly tone. (2) The music remains consistent in tempo as the narrator continues explaining the technical steps. (3) Subtle clicking sound effects occur when the screen recording shows menu selections. (4) The music and vocal narration continue until the end, concluding with a final call-to-action tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3c有意思tim哥' (Watermark). (2) Hook Text: '不到三秒!' (Less than three seconds!) in a bright yellow bubble, conveying excitement. (3) Main Title: 'iPhone 替代文字' (iPhone Text Replacement) with a starburst effect. (4) Functional Text: '設定 > 一般 > 鍵盤 > 替代文字' showing the navigation path. (5) Decorative Text: '一秒快速打出來!' (Type it out in one second!) emphasizing speed. (6) Closing Hook: '還不趕快分享給你的朋友吧' (Quickly share this with your friends) with a pointing emoji.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Animated Context -> UI Step-by-Step Demo -> Practical Application -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator (Tim) appearing on the sofa and in corner overlays.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, silver-rimmed glasses, and a light grey sweatshirt with 'GIANTS' text.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A comfortable living room setting with a light-colored sofa, a grey curtain, and a unique red cushion shaped like a vintage radio/cassette player.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step 1 -> Step 2 -> Benefit -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a technical life hack tutorial designed to increase efficiency for iPhone users. It demonstrates the 'Text Replacement' feature to help users avoid repetitive typing for things like addresses, flight numbers, or emails, presented in an energetic and accessible format common to social media influencers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed demonstration of specific iOS software features and Apple hardware.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Starts with 'Lao Ban' (Boss) greeting, fast-paced editing, grey flat cap aesthetic.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses variety-show style text graphics and high-speed narration to maintain viewer retention for a technical subject.
